notes_for_human_reviewer: HIRE-READY — the full, self-aware development conversation. Works each honest question against real evidence and is candid about the genuine gap (accountability: 'I'm drawn to it but I haven't felt it... I'd be guessing if I told you I'm sure') — honest_self_assessment 5. Names the role change precisely (support vs own; necessary-not-sufficient; the specific new muscles: sponsor management, strategic framing, holding it together when bad) — role_change_understanding 5. Development plan is concrete, sized small, and targets the new skills (own a small piece end-to-end with real accountability; draft the sponsor pre-read; intentional debriefs; a named external mentor) — development_plan 5. Owns the decision with full realism about costs AND explicitly validates staying senior-IC as respectable — agency_and_realism 5. Framed as 'the reps that will tell both of us', not a title demand — professional_framing 5. All five should land 4-5.
